name: Resume & Cover Letter Writer
description: Write or improve resumes and cover letters for job applications

agents.name: Resume Optimizer
agents.purpose: Write or improve a resume tailored to a specific role
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create or improve a resume. Tailor it to the target role. Use strong action verbs, quantify achievements, and follow modern resume best practices. ATS-friendly formatting.

agents.name: Cover Letter Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a cover letter that connects the candidate's experience to the job requirements. Show enthusiasm and cultural fit. Keep it to one page.

suggestion_card.title: Resume Writer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Write resumes and cover letters
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Write a resume for a [role] position at [company]

author: agentfactory
